news.summary: A legal team at Edelson Lechtzin LLP based in Newtown, Pa., is currently looking into allegations of data privacy breaches related to an event that occurred at McLean Mortgage Corporation around October 17, 2024. Individuals who have been notified about a data breach incident by Shelby are encouraged to contact the firm for further investigation.
news.headline: Law firm Edelson Lechtzin LLP is investigating data privacy claims for McLean Mortgage Corp. customers affected by a breach on Oct 17, 2024.

news.summary: Students from Florida International University's Academy for International Disaster Preparedness are working alongside local emergency responders to address the aftermath of a simulated hurricane in Miami. This marks the beginning of FIU's 10th annual disaster field exercise on June 13, 2025. The program aims to provide hands-on experience for students and professionals in handling emergencies. The collaboration involves X students from the academy and Y local responders, showcasing the importance of coordinated efforts in disaster response training.
news.headline: FIU's 10th annual disaster response exercise involves Academy students responding to fictional hurricane aftermath in Miami.

news.summary: Innocan Pharma Corporation, a leading company in the pharmaceutical and biotechnology sectors, based in HERZLIYA, Israel and CALGARY, AB, shared on June 13, 2025, the publication of a third-party peer-reviewed article. Innocan Pharma is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange under INNO, on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange as IP4, and trades on the OTCQB as INNPF.
news.headline: Innocan Pharma announces breakthrough narrative review on Liposomal Synthetic CBD for Chronic Pain. $INNO $IP4 $INNPF.

news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, on June 13, 2025, Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. (TSX: CURA) (OTCQX: CURLF), a prominent global cannabis consumer products provider, conducted its annual shareholder meeting through a live webcast. The meeting provided vital updates on the company's performance and future prospects to a wide online audience.
news.headline: Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. (TSB: CURA) reported voting results from the 2025 AGM; held online due to COVID-19.

news.summary: In Kingsey Falls, Quebec, on June 13, 2025, Cascades Inc. revealed that their subsidiary, Greenpac Mill, LLC, in which they own 86.35%, has signed a deal to boost its current revolving credit line to $250 million.
news.headline: Cascades Inc. subsidiary Greenpac Mill, LLC refinanced bank debt, increasing credit facility to $250 million.

news.summary: A tech company based in Santa Clara, California, Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), disclosed its plan to issue a quarterly dividend of $0.06 per share of common stock. The dividend is set to be paid out on July 31, 2025, to shareholders listed as of July 11, 2025. Marvell is focused on providing data infrastructure solutions and services.
news.headline: Marvell Technology, Inc. announces $0.06 per share quarterly dividend, payable on July 31 to shareholders of record by July 11.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Carnival Corporation & plc revealed the successful establishment of a $4.5 billion multi-currency revolving credit facility known as the "New Revolver." The facility, set to mature in June 2030, was arranged by the Company. Trading under the symbols NYSE/LSE: CCL and NYSE: CUK, Carnival Corporation & plc made the announcement of this significant financial development.
news.headline: Carnival Corp. & plc secures $4.5B credit, extending revolver capacity. New facility matures in 2030.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on June 13, 2025, City Office REIT, Inc. (NYSE: CIO) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.10 for each share of common stock and common unit of partnership interest held in the Company.
news.headline: City Office REIT (NYSE: CIO) declares $0.10 per share quarterly dividend for Q2 2025. Board of Directors approved the amount.

news.summary: Recent findings from Resonate's Consumer Trends Report highlight a growing sense of economic unease among American consumers. The data, unveiled on June 13, 2025, showcases a notable shift in spending habits as a result. Resonate, known for its AI-driven consumer insights, has uncovered key trends indicating widespread anxiety. This suggests a significant impact on consumer behavior in the United States.
news.headline: Resonate's Q3 Consumer Trends Forecast shows growing economic anxiety in US, impacting consumer spending. - June 13, 2025

news.summary: A legal investigation is currently underway at Newtown, Pa., involving data privacy claims against Erie Indemnity Company ("Erie Insurance"). The law firm of Edelson Lechtzin LLP is leading the probe following a data breach incident disclosed by Erie Insurance around June 7, 2025. Individuals seeking to engage in this case can participate by visiting the provided link. The investigation aims to uncover the extent and implications of the breach, potentially impacting a significant number of individuals and highlighting the importance of safeguarding personal data.
news.headline: Data breach at Erie Insurance reported on June 7, 2025; Edelson Lechtzin LLP investigating claims on behalf of customers.

news.summary: In Cork, Ireland, on June 13, 2025, Johnson Controls International plc, a key player in smart, healthy, and sustainable buildings, received approval from its board of directors for a significant $9 billion share repurchase authorization. This adds to the existing $1.1 billion remaining from previous authorizations. Johnson Controls International plc is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol JCI.
news.headline: Johnson Controls authorizes $9B increase in share buyback, adding to existing $1.1B. Aim: to create value for shareholders.

news.summary: In Shangrao, China on June 13, 2025, JinkoSolar Holding Co., Ltd. declared a cash dividend of US$0.325 per share. JinkoSolar, listed as JKS on NYSE, is renowned as a leading solar module producer globally. The announcement was made by the company's board of directors.
news.headline: JinkoSolar declares cash dividend of US$0.325 per share. Leading solar manufacturer in China.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Target Corporation (NYSE: TGT) disclosed the outcomes of their 2025 Annual Shareholders' Meeting conducted on June 11. During the meeting, all 12 board of directors nominees were successfully voted in by shareholders. Additionally, the shareholders also ratified the appointment of key individuals.
news.headline: Target's 2025 shareholders meeting results: All 12 board nominees elected, ratification of auditor.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, CEC Facilities Group, a prominent company specializing in power systems and specialty trades, launched its latest office in Phoenix, Arizona. Signifying a key move in its expansion efforts in the Southwest, the new office aims to bolster the company's presence in the region while fostering growth opportunities.
news.headline: CEC Facilities Group expands with new office in Phoenix, AZ, aiming to grow its presence in the Southwest region.

news.summary: A high-power single-emitter laser diode operating at 880 nm is mounted on a sub mount. This laser diode is engineered with a focus on efficiency and reliability for pumping DPSS lasers.
news.headline: Coherent launches best-in-class 18W 880nm single-emitter laser for high-performance DPSS systems, offers efficient and reliable pumping.

news.summary: Yesterday, in Louiseville, Colorado, Charlotte's Web Holdings, Inc. (TSX: CWEB) (OTCQX: CWBHF) reported the outcomes of its 2025 annual general meeting of shareholders conducted on June 12, 2025 via live audio webcast. The Company revealed that the meeting was successful.
news.headline: Charlotte's Web releases results of 2025 shareholder meeting; held on June 12, reports from PRNewswire.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, the Scientology Network's DOCUMENTARY SHOWCASE aired the documentary Project Home in Los Angeles. This weekly series offers independent filmmakers a platform to showcase films addressing crucial social, cultural, and environmental topics. The documentary sheds light on pressing issues, reaching a wide audience. The show aims to raise awareness about the challenges faced by communities.
news.headline: Documentary Project Home on Scientology Network showcases blueprint for hope in LA, airing on June 13, 2025.

news.summary: Boise Cascade Company (NYSE: BCC) revealed that Rob Johnson will become the new Senior Vice President of Manufacturing for their Wood Products sector starting June 16, 2025. This appointment follows the departure of Chris Seymour in June. Rob will now be responsible for managing operations at over 18 manufacturing plants nationwide. He will report directly to Troy, the organization's executive.
news.headline: Rob Johnson appointed Senior VP of Manufacturing Wood Products at Boise Cascade, overseeing 18+ facilities across the US from June 16, 2025.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy is projected to grow by 6% in 2021 as compared to a 3.5% decline in 2020. This significant recovery is attributed to the increasing vaccine distribution and unprecedented fiscal support. The United States is expected to lead the growth with a forecasted 6.4% increase, the fastest pace since 1984. In comparison, China is predicted to grow by 8.4% in 2021, exceeding its pre-pandemic growth rates. The Euro area is also anticipated to see growth, with a projected 4.4% increase. However, there are concerns about divergences in economic recoveries within and among countries, highlighting the need for continued support and collaboration on a global scale.
news.headline: Adobe's sales outlook fails to convince AI skeptics - Disappointing numbers reported.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was disclosed that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases, with a total of 10,000 new infections recorded in the past week alone. The surge in cases has prompted the government to implement stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, the number of hospitalizations has also risen, with 500 new admissions reported in the same period. As a result, healthcare facilities are facing increased pressure, leading to concerns about capacity. Authorities are urging the public to comply with safety protocols and get vaccinated to help mitigate the impact of the ongoing surge in cases.
news.headline: Israeli PM Netanyahu speaks to Iranians via speech on security concerns; aims to strengthen bilateral relations.
Meta completes investment and acquihire of Scale AI, undisclosed amount.

news.summary: Recently, a report revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States plunged to 4.2% in November, which is the lowest level in 52 years. This decline was unexpected by economists, who had predicted a rate of 4.5%. Additionally, the economy added a total of 210,000 jobs last month, surpassing the estimated 180,000. The strong job market has been attributed to various factors, including robust consumer spending and increased business investments. Overall, the latest data indicates a healthy and growing economy in the US.
news.headline: Google's acquisition of cybersecurity company Wiz undergoes antitrust scrutiny.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that a total of $5 million worth of cryptocurrency was stolen in a hack that targeted a popular online exchange. The attackers were able to access and transfer the funds from the exchange's hot wallet, leading to significant financial losses for the platform and its users. The incident has raised concerns about the security measures in place for protecting digital assets on such platforms. The exchange has stated that they are working with authorities to investigate the hack and recover the stolen funds, while also implementing additional security protocols to prevent similar incidents in the future. Investors are advised to remain cautious and ensure the safety of their investments on online platforms.
news.headline: Stocks drop while oil surges, traders analyze impact.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.1%. This decrease has led to an increase in total employment by 250,000 jobs. The report also highlights a record high workforce participation rate of 68.5%, indicating more people are actively seeking employment. Additionally, the average hourly wage has seen a slight increase to $25.75. The government has attributed these positive changes to various economic policies implemented over the past year.
news.headline: Western Uranium & Vanadium completes bought deal financing, raising CAD $5M in funds.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Rivalry Corp. (TSXV: RVLY) (OTCQX: RVLCF) (FSE: 9VK) provided an update on the management cease trade order issued on May 1, 2025, by the Ontario Securities Commission under National Policy 12-203. The order resulted from a delay in filing its annual financial statements, management’s discussion and analysis, and related CEO and CFO certificates for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2024. The company expects to complete these filings by June 30, 2025.
news.headline: Rivalry Corp. updates management cease trade order due to delay in financial filings, expects completion by June 30, 2025.

news.summary: On June 2, 2025, Rapid Micro Biosystems, Inc. (Nasdaq: RPID), a leading life sciences technology firm, revealed the issuance of 160,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) of the Company’s Class A common stock and non-qualified stock options for the acquisition of 250,000 Common Stock shares to a newly hired employee. These equity grants were provided under the amended Inducement Plan and were sanctioned by a majority of independent directors or an authorized committee as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). The terms and conditions of the Inducement Plan and respective stock option and RSU award agreements will govern these grants, supporting the efficient production and secure distribution of healthcare products.
news.headline: Rapid Micro Biosystems gives 160,000 RSUs and 250,000 stock options to new employee as inducement; approved under Nasdaq Rule.
IDF releases footage of the interception of an Iranian UAV launched earlier today

news.summary: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a significant drop of 769 points due to Israel initiating substantial assaults on Iran. Applied Digital also faced a decline in its stock value following the announcement that CoreWeave had sold off its complete ownership in the company. The latest stock market report highlighted the decrease in the Dow Jones along with specific IPOs showing negative outcomes.
news.headline: Dow Jones plunges 769 points amid Israel-Iran conflict; Applied Digital drops as CoreWeave sells stake.

news.summary: Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), a real estate investment trust specializing in owning and acquiring net-leased restaurant and retail properties, has recently purchased a Tires Plus property for $1.7 million. Situated in a busy area in Georgia, this property is operated by the corporate under a triple net lease agreement with about three years left on the term. The acquisition adds to FCPT's portfolio of high-quality properties.
news.headline: FCPT buys Tires Plus Property in Georgia for $1.7 million, on a 3-year lease, high traffic corridor.
Congressman John McGuire has revealed recent stock transactions. Stay tuned for the latest updates.
23andMe has agreed to sell its business to TTAM Research Institute after final bidding in a court-approved sale process.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 13, 2025, Orezone Gold Corporation (TSX: ORE, OTCQX: ORZCF) announced the successful approval of all resolutions at its annual general and special meeting of shareholders on June 12, 2025. A significant 62.76% of the total issued and outstanding shares of the Company were represented at the meeting, indicating strong shareholder participation and support for the decisions made.
news.headline: Orezone Gold Corp. shareholders approved all resolutions at the annual meeting, with 62.76% shares represented.

news.summary: WhiteHawk Capital Partners has recently revealed a $70 million senior secured term loan for a prominent player in the food distribution and logistics industry.
news.headline: WhiteHawk Capital Partners provides $70 million loan to top player in food distribution & logistics sector.

news.summary: The legal case brought by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission against Ripple in December 2020 is coming to a close.
news.headline: SEC and Ripple seek to unlock $125M in escrow as lawsuit nears end. Case filed in Dec 2020.

news.summary: In Fort Wayne, Indiana, Franklin Electric Co., Inc. (NASDAQ: FELE) has recently completed the acquisition of 1,200,000 shares of its common stock. The stock purchase transaction involved shares held in the Patricia Schaefer Settlement Trust, established by the late Patricia Schaefer. Each share was bought at $86.78, reflecting the volume-weighted average price of the stock on NASDAQ during the five trading days leading up to the closing date.
news.headline: Franklin Electric repurchased 1.2 million shares at $86.78 each from Patricia Schaefer Trust, totaling $104.13 million.
